# Caliper Log Analysis

**Summary**: Measurement of borehole diameter to identify areas of breakout, washouts, or enlargement.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014]] used caliper-log-analysis to validate the predicted failures in the MEM against actual wellbore conditions.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- Caliper logs provided a direct measurement of failure that matched Mogi-Coulomb predictions better than Mohr-Coulomb. ([[2014-al-haidary|Al-Haidary, 2014, p. 65]])
